message:
test(indexer): Add streaming indexing tests (Opt 8.3)

Comprehensive tests for streaming indexing architecture:

Feature flag tests (3):
- test_streaming_enabled_by_default
- test_streaming_disabled_via_env_var
- test_streaming_enabled_with_explicit_1

Equivalence tests (2):
- test_streaming_batch_equivalence_message_count
- test_streaming_batch_equivalence_search_results

Determinism tests (1):
- test_streaming_indexing_deterministic

Large corpus tests (1):
- test_streaming_larger_corpus (50 sessions)

Incremental indexing tests (1):
- test_streaming_incremental_indexing

Empty corpus tests (1):
- test_streaming_empty_corpus

Mixed mode tests (1):
- test_switch_from_batch_to_streaming

All 10 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
